evals.prompt: I have /home/me/Downloads/MiniMax Code-3.0.46.dmg. Convert it to a Linux portable folder here, don't install anything.
evals.expected_output: Uses the bundled conversion script with --dmg, builds in the current working directory, reports the output folder and run command, and does not ask to install because the user explicitly said not to install.

evals.prompt: Download MiniMax Code 3.0.46 from the minimax release CDN and build the linux version in ./builds/minimax-code. If it works, ask me whether I want it installed.
evals.expected_output: Uses the bundled conversion script with --version 3.0.46 and --out ./builds/minimax-code without --install; after success, asks whether to install/register the build for launcher and SSO callbacks.

evals.prompt: The converted MiniMax Code says 服务启动失败. Rebuild it from the DMG using the skill and make sure the daemon resources and sqlite native module are handled.
evals.expected_output: Runs or recommends the bundled converter, noting that it copies bundled daemon resources and rebuilds better-sqlite3 for Electron ABI, then asks whether to install/register after a successful portable build.

evals.prompt: Convert /home/me/Downloads/MiniMax Code-3.0.46.dmg to Linux and install it so SSO redirects work from my browser. Replace the old install if needed.
evals.expected_output: Uses the bundled conversion script with --dmg and --install; because the user explicitly allowed replacement, includes --replace-install if the install path already exists or if doing a one-shot replace install.
